entities.name: ICGV 87187
entities.description: A Spanish-type groundnut variety released in 1990, characterized by decumbent growth habit and photoperiod insensitivity.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the crop species for the variety ICGV 87187.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where ICGV 87187 is cultivated.

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: A state in India where ICGV 87187 is cultivated and tested.

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where ICGV 87187 is cultivated.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where ICGV 87187 is cultivated.

entities.name: SINGLE-PLANT SELECTION
entities.description: The breeding method used to derive ICGV 87187 from a natural hybrid population.

entities.name: ROBUT 33-1
entities.description: A Virginia-type Indian groundnut variety used as a parent for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The physical growth form of the plant, described as decumbent 2 to decumbent 3 for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach maturity, 110-120 days for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: SHELLING TURNOVER
entities.description: The percentage of pod weight that is seed, 70% for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD INSENSITIVITY
entities.description: The ability of the plant to flower and mature regardless of day length.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The amount of pods produced per unit area, ranging from 2.14 to 4.34 t/ha for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: J11
entities.description: A control groundnut variety used for comparison with ICGV 87187.

entities.name: ON-FARM ADAPTIVE TRIALS
entities.description: Field trials conducted to evaluate the performance of ICGV 87187 in Gujarat.

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the seeds, described as medium-sized for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: SEED COLOUR
entities.description: The color of the seeds, described as tan for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, which is 53 g for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of oil in the seeds, 48% for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein in the seeds, 23% for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: OLEIC : LINOLEIC ACID RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of oleic to linoleic acid in the seed oil, 1.04 for ICGV 87187.

entities.name: SUMMER GROUNDNUT ZONE II
entities.description: The specific agro-ecological zone in India for the cultivation of summer groundnut.
